latin: Vir simplex, qui multa in vita fecerat, amicam suam denique invenit. 'non sum homo sapiens,' dixit, 'sed scio quid amor sit.'

questions.prompt: What does the simple man admit?
questions.target: He is not a smart man
choices: He is not a smart man

questions.prompt: What does he claim to understand?

translation: A simple man, who had done many things in life, finally found his beloved. 'I am not a smart man,' he said, 'but I know what love is.'
